name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state[i] = "idle"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, Coordinator, Participant, decision, state, vote

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
Commit == "Commit"
Abort == "Abort"

(* Message structure: [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}] *)
Message == [sender \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            receiver \in Participants \cup {coordinator},
            type \in {Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort}]

(* All messages are stored in the messages set *)
AllMessages == messages

(* Coordinator's state: "Init", "Waiting", "Commit", "Abort" *)
CoordinatorState == {"Init", "Waiting", "Commit", "Abort"}

(* Coordinator's state variable *)
CoordinatorStateVar == coordinator.state

(* Coordinator's vote: "Yes", "No", or "Unknown" *)
CoordinatorVote == {"Yes", "No", "Unknown"}

(* Coordinator's vote variable *)
CoordinatorVoteVar == coordinator.vote

(* Coordinator's decision: "Commit", "Abort", or "Unknown" *)
CoordinatorDecision == {"Commit", "Abort", "Unknown"}

(* Coordinator's decision variable *)
CoordinatorDecisionVar == coordinator.decision

(* Coordinator's message set *)
CoordinatorMessages == coordinator.messages

(* Coordinator's message variable *)
CoordinatorMessagesVar == coordinator.messages

(* Participant's state: "Init", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
ParticipantState == {"Init", "Waiting", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Participant's state variable *)
ParticipantStateVar == participants.state

(* Participant's vote: "Yes", "No", or "Unknown" *)
ParticipantVote == {"Yes", "No", "Unknown"}

(* Participant's vote variable *)
ParticipantVoteVar == participants.vote

(* Participant's decision: "Commit", "Abort", or "Unknown" *)
ParticipantDecision == {"Commit", "Abort", "Unknown"}

(* Participant's decision variable *)
ParticipantDecisionVar == participants.decision

(* Participant's message set *)
ParticipantMessages == participants.messages

(* Participant's message variable *)
ParticipantMessagesVar == participants.messages

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init",
                                            vote |-> "Unknown",
                                            decision |-> "Unknown",
                                            messages |-> {}]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init",
                    vote |-> "Unknown",
                    decision |-> "Unknown",
                    messages |-> {}]
  /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare ==
  /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Waiting"
  /\ coordinator.vote' = "Unknown"
  /\ coordinator.decision' = "Unknown"
  /\ coordinator.messages' = {}
  /\ participants' = [i \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init",
                                               vote |-> "Unknown",
                                               decision |-> "Unknown",
                                               messages |-> {}]]
  /\ messages' = messages
  /\ \A i \in Participants :
       messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                    receiver |-> i,
                                    type |-> Prepare] }

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes ==
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
       /\ messages \in [sender |-> coordinator,
                        receiver |-> i,
                        type |-> Prepare]
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Waiting"
       /\ participants[i].vote' = "Yes"
       /\ participants[i].decision' = "Unknown"
       /\ participants[i].messages' = {}
       /\ coordinator.state' = coordinator.state
       /\ coordinator.vote' = coordinator.vote
       /\ coordinator.decision' = coordinator.decision
       /\ coordinator.messages' = coordinator.messages
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                    receiver |-> i,
                                    type |-> Prepare] }
       /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> i,
                                        receiver |-> coordinator,
                                        type |-> VoteYes] }

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
       /\ messages \in [sender |-> coordinator,
                        receiver |-> i,
                        type |-> Prepare]
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Waiting"
       /\ participants[i].vote' = "No"
       /\ participants[i].decision' = "Unknown"
       /\ participants[i].messages' = {}
       /\ coordinator.state' = coordinator.state
       /\ coordinator.vote' = coordinator.vote
       /\ coordinator.decision' = coordinator.decision
       /\ coordinator.messages' = coordinator.messages
       /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                    receiver |-> i,
                                    type |-> Prepare] }
       /\ messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> i,
                                        receiver |-> coordinator,
                                        type |-> VoteNo] }

(* Coordinator receives all Yes votes and decides Commit *)
CoordinatorDecideCommit ==
  /\ coordinator.state = "Waiting"
  /\ \A i \in Participants :
       /\ messages \in [sender |-> i,
                        receiver |-> coordinator,
                        type |-> VoteYes]
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
  /\ coordinator.vote' = "Yes"
  /\ coordinator.decision' = "Commit"
  /\ coordinator.messages' = {}
  /\ participants' = [i \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Waiting",
                                               vote |-> participants[i].vote,
                                               decision |-> "Unknown",
                                               messages |-> {}]]
  /\ messages' = messages
  /\ \A i \in Participants :
       messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                    receiver |-> i,
                                    type |-> Commit] }

(* Coordinator receives any No vote and decides Abort *)
CoordinatorDecideAbort ==
  /\ coordinator.state = "Waiting"
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ messages \in [sender |-> i,
                        receiver |-> coordinator,
                        type |-> VoteNo]
  /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
  /\ coordinator.vote' = "No"
  /\ coordinator.decision' = "Abort"
  /\ coordinator.messages' = {}
  /\ participants' = [i \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Waiting",
                                               vote |-> participants[i].vote,
                                               decision |-> "Unknown",
                                               messages |-> {}]]
  /\ messages' = messages
  /\ \A i \in Participants :
       messages' = messages' \cup { [sender |-> coordinator,
                                    receiver |-> i,
                                    type |-> Abort] }

(* Participant receives Commit and commits *)
ParticipantCommit ==
  /\ \E i \in Participants :
       /\ participants[i].state = "Waiting"
       /\ messages \in [sender |-> coordinator,
                        receiver |-> i,
                        type |-> Commit]
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Committed"
       /\ participants[i].vote' = participants[i].vote
       /\ participants[i].decision' = "Commit"
       /\ participants[i].messages' = {}
       /\ coordinator.state' = coordinator.state
       /\ coordinator.vote' = coordinator.vote
       /\ coordinator.decision' = coordinator.decision
       /\ coordinator.messages' = coordinator.messages
       /\ messages' = messa

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

CanEat(i) == state[i] = "hungry"
            /\ forks[i] = i
            /\ forks[If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = 1, N, i - 1)] = i]
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          \/ /\ CanEat(i)
              /\ TakeForks(i)
          \/ /\ state[i] = "eating"
              /\ PutForks(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = {}
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> ==

====
